def build_card_message(card_name: str, card_data: dict) -> str:
    attack = card_data.get("attack", "0")
    health = card_data.get("health", "0")
    attack_boost = card_data.get("attack_boost", "")
    health_boost = card_data.get("health_boost", "")
    atk_text = f"{attack} {attack_boost}".strip()
    hp_text = f"{health} {health_boost}".strip()
    return (
        f"**{card_name}**\n"
        f"**ATK:** {atk_text}\n"
